nasb.text: When these had come to Caesarea and delivered the letter to the governor, they also presented Paul to him.

esv.text: When they had come to Caesarea and delivered the letter to the governor, they presented Paul also before him.

cnv.text: 騎兵到了該撒利亞，把信呈上總督，同時把保羅也交給他。

ccb.text: 他们到了凯撒利亚，将公文呈交总督，把保罗交给他。

csbs.text: 骑兵进了凯撒里亚，把信函呈给总督，又把保罗带到他面前。
